author: Jason Williams
content:
My sister and I went into Feed on our way into St Ives via the Park and Ride . We tried it, as the cafe across the road is now closed.
This turned out to be a blessing as the coffee and staff were excellent.
This is not your average leisure centre cafe .
It has an excellent selection , including some healthy options.
We were so impressed we went back there to have our lunch and were not disappointed.
I highly recommend it. I think it has only been there a short while. So give it a try.
